reviews.review_title: Best Entry Yet in Tokyo Chronos Series!
reviews.review_description:
I've played each of the Tokyo Chronos VR games by MyDearest and IzanagiGames since the beginning and Dyschronia is the best entry so far. It features an engaging story, interesting puzzles, and well-designed immersive environments that provide all sorts opportunities for interaction. I particularly liked the option to access memories of different characters and use that information to change the course of the story.

This is a must-play game for both anime and VR fans alike, and I look forward to seeing what comes out next for the Tokyo Chronos series.

I bought all 3 episode and when i finished episode 1, i begun to play episode2. But every time I enter the first scene of the episode 2, it automatically crashed after the system was updated to v77. Even after reinstalling the game multiple times, it still won't run.

Now the game can run finally after update.
Please make the other chronos games have a demo like you did on switch.
Recently there was a review for crashing. Now it's fine. Changing this review to positive

Right when i finish chapter 1 , it automatically downloading addon , but then it keep stuck at 2/9 sometime 1/5 .....1/4 , i try to close the game and turn back on after the download stuck , it gave me a loading then crash , , there is the time that it download are done and it tell me that too , but then after the loading is a black screen , it not even show the loading circle , then i try to turn it off and on again , guess , IT CRASH .... AGAINN., YES right after the game show me the last scene of chapter 1 , Seriously ?????

developer_response.body: We apologize for the inconvenience. In the latest version (v3.0.67), we have fixed the DLC downloading issue.

reviews.review_description: I’ve got this game with VR+ and I feel like I should get a refund for my time wasted! If you like to read simple paragraphs one at a time while listening to some annoying elevator music, this will be for you. If this is a story to read, ok, if you are into reading stories in Vr, but it’s barely a game. I have to say though I could not make beyond 1 hour of this game, but by what I’ve seen on YouTube it’s just more of the same. But, same people liked it!

The graphics are great and story too but there’s way too much talking and you’re not as free as it seems. You’re constantly forced guided towards your objectives, it’s more like watching a movie than playing a game.

It does not start on my quest 3. 
After initial logo - black screen.
https://www.oculus.com /appreferrals/SweetBunBun/5040861172638649/?utm_source=2
Can't understand the good ratings.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for the review!
Can you contact support@mydearestvrc.com and explain the issue you are experiencing?

reviews.review_description: This is very fun to play, (even if I get nauseous with turning in some rooms) the storyline is great, and the characters are unique. There is a few problems, like, the camera sometimes glitches somewhere else, and the dialogue is hard to read, when it is moveable.
I am so into the story. also the images are unbelievably awesome for standalone!
Great Game. Try it, you'll love it!

reviews.review_title: Solving a Murder Mystery in VR
reviews.review_description:
There is a ton of potential in Dyschronia: Chronos Alternate but unfortunately, it lacks some of the best qualities that VR gaming has to offer. The Chronos Universe may be worth exploring but I would rather see this world outside of VR at this point.

*Part of a review available on Forever Classic Games

The storyline is trivial and the game is very slow in the sense that there is way to much time in between parts of the text/speech in the dialogue with the characters in the game.

There are parts of the game, like small puzzles, that could have been extended quite a lot without any significant extra development work. The game feels more like a demo of what can be done than a game to be sold.

This is one of my first VR games and even though I am amazed by the VR technology in this game the game itself is disappointing. I cannot imagine myself purchasing part 2 and 3 of this game even though I spent the time to play this part to the end.

reviews.review_title: Best VR Story Experience in the Market!!
reviews.review_description:
In a VR era of shooters, hack & slash, and rhythm games, this Adventure game is a breath of fresh air. And it's extremely well crafted too.
There's really no other VR game out there that delivers a rich story experience like this one.

Looking forward to Ep 2 & 3!
Just not enough choices or exploring

The game is good

But the dev add sakana/fish

Even better

reviews.review_title: The movement will cause motion sickness
reviews.review_description:
Graphics very beautiful but the movement might cause motion sickness, at least for me, probably too smooth of movement. I will give it a try again after feeling better, now this is it.
Voice too quiet I think, or is it background  noise too loud, a bit imbalance in sound.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing Dyschronia! If you feel motion sickness we recommend you to use warp movement (right stick) or switching between both modes during the game. We added the warp movement so the players can have the best playing experience, avoiding the motion sickness.

reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed this game. 
Now awaiting the 3rd episode which I thought was being released Jan 2023?
